description: [ELON] Create webhook_log table schema: id, webhookId (from Shopify), topic, shopDomain, receivedAt, processedAt, status (pending/success/failed), retryCount, errorMessage, payload (JSONB). Create dead_letter_queue table: id, webhookId, topic, failedAt, payload, lastError.
successCriteria: webhook_log table schema defined in Drizzle
Both tables have indexes on webhookId and receivedAt
Payload stored as JSONB for queryability
